name: Cream Cheese Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the softened butter and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the softened cream cheese and beat until well combined.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in the egg yolk and vanilla extract.
5. Stir in the flour, shredded coconut, chocolate chips, and lemon peel.
6. Form the dough into tablespoon-sized balls or walnut-sized balls and flatten slightly.
7. Drop the balls onto greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 375°F for 15-18 minutes, or until golden around the edges.
9. Cool on wire racks.
